genre_refs: testimonial pull-quote card; American diner Americana
description: White House quote card built on a darkened photograph of a diner: a large American flag hangs on the wall, a waitress in an apron (a '...0 Diner' shirt partially visible) stands at left, and a customer under red-tinted lighting sits in a checkerboard-floored booth. The photo is dimmed and red/dark-toned. Centered near the top is the engraved White House line-drawing emblem. Below it, in large white serif with curly quotation marks, is the pull-quote 'I Got Back Every Penny'. A white sans-serif attribution follows: 'Nicole Mendoza, 68-year-old waitress, on filing her taxes thanks to' and then a red highlight box reading 'No Tax on Overtime'. Lower center, in bold white, is the source 'New York Times'.
notable_text: "I Got Back Every Penny" Nicole Mendoza, 68-year-old waitress, on filing her taxes thanks to No Tax on Overtime. New York Times
